challenge.title: Deklarisi Doctype HTML Dokumenta
challenge.description:
Prethodni izazovi su se doticali specificnih HTML elemenata i njihove upotrebe. Ipak, postoji nekoliko elemenata koji daju celokupnu strukturu stranici i treba da budu ukljuceni u svaki HTML dokument.

Na juu kabisa ya hati unapaswa kumwambia kivinjari ni toleo gani la HTML linalotumiwa na ukurasa. HTML ni lugha inayoendelea na kusasishwa mara kwa mara. Vivinjari vya kisasa vinaunga mkono toleo la hivi karibuni, HTML5. Hata hivyo, tovuti za zamani zinaweza kutumia matoleo ya awali ya lugha hii.

Unatoa taarifa hii kwa kivinjari kwa kuongeza lebo <!DOCTYPE ...> kwenye mstari wa kwanza, ambapo ... ni toleo la HTML. Kwa HTML5 hutumika <!DOCTYPE html>.

! i veliko DOCTYPE su bitni, posebno za starije pregledace. html moze biti malim ili velikim slovima.

Kisha msimbo wote wa HTML unapaswa kufungwa ndani ya lebo za html. Lebo ya kufungua <html> huenda mara moja chini ya mstari wa <!DOCTYPE html>, na lebo ya kufunga </html> huenda mwisho wa ukurasa.

Evo primera strukture stranice. Vas HTML kod ide izmedju dva html taga.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

</html>
challenge.instructions: Ongeza lebo ya DOCTYPE ya HTML5 juu ya hati tupu ya HTML kwenye kihariri. Chini yake ongeza lebo ya kufungua na kufunga html, ambazo zinapaswa kuzunguka kipengele cha h1. Kichwa kinaweza kuwa na maandishi yoyote.

tests.text: Vas kod treba da sadrzi <!DOCTYPE html> oznaku.
html tagovi treba da obuhvataju jedan h1 element.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
The best page ever

Cat ipsum dolor sit amet, jump launch to pounce upon little yarn mouse, bare fangs at toy run hide in litter box until treats are fed. Go into a room to decide you didn't want to be in there anyway. I like big cats and i can not lie kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff. Meow i could pee on this if i had the energy for slap owner's face at 5am until human fills food dish yet scamper. Knock dish off table head butt cant eat out of my own dish scratch the furniture. Make meme, make cute face. Sleep in the bathroom sink chase laser but pee in the shoe. Paw at your fat belly licks your face and eat grass, throw it back up kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff.
